9/1 for abscess of right lower extremity. he does not recall any injury however a lump with redness appeared after he rented a u-haul truck to move some things. over the next couple of days it became more painful, enlarged, became more red. patient presented to [facility_name] ed. i&d was done for large abscess, started on vancomycin. he was transferred to geauga. wound culture positive for mrsa. he received vanco. followed by infectious disease. he has an upcoming appointment with the wound clinic. currently his wife is packing and dressing the wound daily. he was discharged on doxycycline. hypertension, controlled, continue amlodipine 5 mg 2 times daily, carvedilol 25 mg twice a day. diabetes, controlled, a1c 7.0. morbid obesity, bmi 59, he was referred to bariatric surgery | review of systems constitutional: negative for activity change, chills, fatigue and unexpected weight change. hent: negative for congestion, ear pain and sore throat. eyes: negative. respiratory: negative for cough, shortness of breath and wheezing. cardiovascular: negative for chest pain, palpitations and leg swelling. gastrointestinal: negative. negative for abdominal pain, constipation, diarrhea, nausea and vomiting.
